_comment: Mapping of Ollama model families to HuggingFace source models, descriptions, and metadata. Community-maintained. Last updated: 2026-04-22.

_format.huggingface_base: HuggingFace org/repo prefix (append size variant for full ID)
_format.description: One-line plain-English description of the model family
_format.tasks: What the model is designed for: general, coding, math, vision, embedding, etc.
_format.successor: Ollama name of the recommended newer model, if any

llama2.description: Meta's second-generation open LLM, strong general-purpose performance
llama2.notes: Largely superseded by Llama 3.x in all benchmarks

llama3.description: Meta's third-generation LLM with improved reasoning and instruction following

llama3.1.description: Extended Llama 3 with 128K context and tool use support

llama3.2.description: Lightweight Llama models (1B/3B) plus multimodal vision variants (11B/90B)
llama3.2.notes: 1B and 3B are text-only; 11B and 90B add vision capabilities

llama3.3.description: Latest Llama text model, 70B with performance rivaling larger models

codellama.description: Code-specialized Llama 2 fine-tune for code generation and understanding
codellama.notes: Superseded by newer coding models (Qwen2.5-Coder, DeepSeek-Coder-V2)

mistral.description: Efficient 7B model with sliding window attention, strong for its size

mixtral.description: Mixture-of-experts model: 47B total params, 13B active per token
mixtral.notes: First widely popular open MoE model

mistral-small.description: 24B dense model, Mistral's recommended small model for most tasks

mistral-large.description: Mistral's flagship 123B model for complex reasoning

phi3.description: Microsoft's compact model family, strong performance relative to size

phi4.description: Microsoft's 14B model with reasoning focus, trained on synthetic data

gemma.description: Google's lightweight open model built from Gemini research

gemma2.description: Second-gen Gemma with improved quality at 2B, 9B, and 27B sizes

gemma3.description: Third-gen Gemma with vision support and 128K context

codegemma.description: Code-specialized Gemma for generation, completion, and understanding

qwen2.description: Second-gen Qwen with improved multilingual and coding ability

qwen2.5.description: Strong all-round model family from 0.5B to 72B, competitive with Llama 3

qwen2.5-coder.description: Code-specialized Qwen2.5, top open coding model at multiple sizes

qwen3.description: Third-gen Qwen with hybrid thinking (can toggle chain-of-thought on/off)

qwen3.5.description: Latest Qwen MoE models with vision and thinking support
qwen3.5.notes: MoE architecture — e.g. 35B total / 3B active means fast inference despite large param count

deepseek-coder.description: Code-focused model trained on 2T tokens of code data

deepseek-coder-v2.description: MoE coding model, 236B total / 21B active, strong on code and math

deepseek-v2.description: Large MoE model with Multi-head Latent Attention for efficiency

deepseek-r1.description: Reasoning model trained with reinforcement learning, excels at math and logic
deepseek-r1.notes: 671B MoE (37B active). Distilled versions available at smaller sizes.

command-r.description: Cohere's RAG-optimized model with grounded generation and tool use

command-r-plus.description: Larger Command-R (104B) for complex RAG and multi-step tool use

starcoder2.description: Code model trained on The Stack v2, available at 3B, 7B, 15B

yi.description: Bilingual (English/Chinese) model from 01.AI, available up to 34B

vicuna.description: LLaMA fine-tuned on ShareGPT conversations, early open chat model
vicuna.notes: Historically significant but outperformed by modern models

solar.description: Upstage's depth-upscaled model, 10.7B from merged Llama/Mistral layers

nous-hermes2.description: Community fine-tune focused on instruction following and helpfulness

dolphin-mixtral.description: Uncensored Mixtral fine-tune for unrestricted conversation

openchat.description: Chat model using C-RLFT (conditioned reinforcement learning fine-tuning)

zephyr.description: Mistral-based chat model aligned with DPO, HuggingFace's reference model

tinyllama.description: Compact 1.1B model trained on 3T tokens, good for constrained environments

falcon.description: TII's early open model, available at 7B, 40B, 180B
falcon.notes: Largely superseded by newer model families

granite.description: IBM's enterprise-focused model family, strong on code and business tasks

llava.description: Visual instruction-tuned model — understands images and answers questions about them

nomic-embed-text.description: Text embedding model with 8K context, good for RAG and semantic search

all-minilm.description: Lightweight sentence embedding model, fast and widely used for similarity

snowflake-arctic-embed.description: High-quality text embedding model optimized for retrieval

mxbai-embed-large.description: State-of-the-art embedding model for retrieval and similarity tasks

wizardlm2.description: Instruction-tuned model focused on complex instruction following

wizardcoder.description: Code-focused Evol-Instruct fine-tune, multiple base model variants

internlm2.description: Shanghai AI Lab's multilingual model with strong reasoning

glm4.description: Tsinghua's bilingual model with tool use and code capabilities

smollm2.description: Ultra-compact models (135M to 1.7B) for on-device and constrained use
smollm2.notes: Designed for edge devices, phones, and resource-limited environments
